title: ExplosiveAircraft
description: Adds explosive weapons to Immersive Aircraft
body:
# 💣 Explosive Aircraft

**Explosive Aircraft** is an expansion for [Immersive Aircraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-aircraft), adding high-tier bomb bays for players who want a bit more "oomph" in their aerial combat. 

Whether you're doing precision strikes or total carpet bombing, these new bays ensure you have the right payload for the job.

---

## ✨ Features

This mod introduces two new tiers of Bomb Bays to upgrade your aircraft:

### 💎 Diamond Bomb Bay
*   **Capacity:** High-tier durability and storage.
*   **Payload:** Drops **Standard TNT**.
*   **Description:** The reliable choice for standard demolition and tactical strikes.

### 🔥 Netherite Bomb Bay
*   **Capacity:** Ultimate tier.
*   **Payload:** Drops **Strong TNT**.
*   **Special Ability:** The Strong TNT features **1.5x the explosive power** of a regular TNT block. 
*   **Description:** Designed for maximum destruction. If you want a hole in the ground (or a base), this is the tool for you.

---

## 🛠️ Requirements

Since this is an Architectury-based addon, you will need the following installed:

*   **[Architectury API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api)**
*   **[Immersive Aircraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-aircraft)**
*   **NeoForge** or **Fabric** (1.21.1)

---

## 🚀 Installation

1.  Ensure you have the correct version of **Fabric** or **NeoForge** installed for **1.21.1**.
2.  Download **Architectury API** and **Immersive Aircraft**.
3.  Drop **Explosive Aircraft** into your `mods` folder.
4.  Take to the skies and start the bombardment!

---

## 📜 Credits

*   **Original Mod:** Special thanks to the creators of [Immersive Aircraft](https://github.com/Conczin/immersive-aircraft) for the amazing vehicle framework.
*   **Development:** Created with Architectury to support both NeoForge and Fabric users.

---

> **Note:** Always be careful where you drop your payload. Strong TNT does not distinguish between enemies and your own landing strip!
